description: Navigate to Point Nemo (48°52.6'S, 123°23.6'W) and create a placemark named 'Point Nemo - Oceanic Pole of Inaccessibility'. Then navigate to Ducie Island (24°40'S, 124°47'W) and create a placemark named 'Ducie Island - Nearest Land to Point Nemo'. Measure the distance between the two points and save all placemarks and the measurement path to /home/ga/Documents/point_nemo_isolation.kml.
